subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter addressed to Jinab-i-Afnán was perused. Regarding that individual [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان آنچه بجناب افنان مرقوم نموده بودی ملاحظه گردید در خصوص آنشخص
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
